data.en: What are you doing at the moment?
data.hint: Preposition 'at' the moment / 固定搭配 'at the moment'

data.en: Hello, this is Peter speaking.
data.hint: Phone greeting 'this is... speaking' / 电话用语 '我是...'

data.en: Could I speak to Jane, please?
data.cn: 请问我可以和简说话吗？
data.hint: Polite request 'Could I' / 礼貌请求 'Could I'
accept: Please, could I speak to Jane?

data.en: Hold on, please.
data.hint: Phone phrase 'Hold on' / 电话用语 '稍等'

data.en: Sorry, she is out at the moment.
data.hint: Be out (not at home) / 不在（家）

data.en: Can I take a message?
data.hint: Phrase 'take a message' / 短语 '捎个口信'

data.en: Would you like to leave a message?
data.hint: Phrase 'leave a message' / 短语 '留个口信'

data.en: Could you ask him to call me back?
data.cn: 你能让他给我回个电话吗？
data.hint: Phrase 'call back' / 短语 '回电话'

data.en: I am afraid he is not home yet.
data.hint: Adverb 'yet' for negative / 否定句末用 'yet'

data.en: It is great to hear your voice!
data.hint: It is + adj + to do / It is + 形容词 + to do

data.en: I am doing my homework now.
data.hint: Present continuous 'am doing' / 现在进行时 'am doing'
accept: Now I am doing my homework.

data.en: He is shopping at the supermarket.
data.hint: Double 'p' before 'ing' / 辅音双写加 'ing'

data.en: Are you riding a bike?
data.hint: Drop 'e' before 'ing' / 去 'e' 加 'ing'

data.en: They are washing the dishes.
data.hint: Plural subject 'They are' / 复数主语 'They are'

data.en: My mother is gardening outside.
data.cn: 我妈妈正在外面做园艺。
data.hint: Verb 'garden' + ing / 动词 'garden' 加 'ing'

data.en: We are watching a film.
data.hint: Verb 'watch' + ing / 动词 'watch' 加 'ing'

data.en: The boys are having fun.
data.hint: Phrase 'have fun' / 短语 '玩得开心'

data.en: She is taking an online class.
data.hint: Vowel sound starts with 'o' -> 'an' / 元音音素开头用 'an'

data.en: I am walking my dog in the park.
data.hint: Phrase 'walk a dog' / 短语 '遛狗'
accept: In the park I am walking my dog.

data.en: He is painting a tree.
data.hint: Present continuous 'is painting' / 现在进行时 'is painting'

data.en: We are having a holiday here.
data.hint: Phrase 'have a holiday' / 短语 '度假'
accept: Here we are having a holiday.

data.en: I am making zongzi with my friend.
data.cn: 我正在和朋友一起包粽子。
data.hint: Preposition 'with' / 介词 'with' (和...一起)

data.en: Are you preparing for the Dragon Boat Festival?
data.cn: 你们在为端午节做准备吗？
data.hint: Phrase 'prepare for' / 短语 '为...准备'

data.en: We are watching dragon boat races on TV.
data.cn: 我们正在电视上看龙舟赛。
data.hint: Preposition 'on' TV / 固定搭配 'on TV'

data.en: I am writing to you from Pingyao.
data.hint: Drop 'e' before 'ing' / 去 'e' 加 'ing'

data.en: My uncle is showing us all the sights.
data.cn: 我叔叔正带我们游览所有名胜。
data.hint: Show somebody something / 给某人展示某物

data.en: We are staying near the famous city walls.
data.cn: 我们正住在著名的城墙附近。
data.hint: Present continuous 'are staying' / 现在进行时 'are staying'

data.en: I hope it is all going well.
data.hint: Phrase 'go well' / 短语 '进展顺利'

data.en: I am looking forward to seeing you soon.
data.hint: look forward to + -ing / 固定搭配 'look forward to + 动名词'

data.en: My father is washing the car right now.
data.hint: Time phrase 'right now' / 时间状语 'right now' (现在)
accept: Right now my father is washing the car.

data.en: What time is it in New York?
data.hint: Preposition 'in' for cities / 城市前用介词 'in'

data.en: People are rushing to get home from work.
data.hint: Verb + infinitive / 动词 + 不定式 (to get)

data.en: They are not in a hurry.
data.hint: Phrase 'in a hurry' / 短语 '匆忙'

data.en: Lights are shining brightly across the city.
data.cn: 整个城市的灯光明亮地闪耀着。
data.hint: Adverb modifies verb / 副词修饰动词

data.en: People are eating delicious food.
data.cn: 人们正在吃美味的食物。
data.hint: 'People' is a plural noun / 'People' 是复数名词

data.en: People are working hard in their offices.
data.cn: 人们在办公室里努力工作。
data.hint: Adverb 'hard' / 副词 'hard' (努力地)
accept: In their offices people are working hard.

data.en: The city is getting busy.
data.hint: Double 't' before 'ing' / 双写 't' 加 'ing'

data.en: Taxis are picking up passengers.
data.hint: Phrase 'pick up' / 短语 '接载'

data.en: The giraffe is drinking water.
data.hint: Present continuous for animals / 动物的现在进行时

data.en: I am jogging with my dog in the morning sunshine.
data.cn: 我正沐浴着晨光和我的狗一起慢跑。
data.hint: Double 'g' before 'ing' / 双写 'g' 加 'ing'
accept: In the morning sunshine I am jogging with my dog.

data.en: There are many tourists here.
data.hint: 'There are' for plural nouns / 复数名词用 'There are'

data.en: They are visiting the museums and galleries.
data.cn: 他们正在参观博物馆和画廊。
data.hint: Present continuous 'are visiting' / 现在进行时 'are visiting'

data.en: I am taking lots of photos.
data.hint: Plural noun 'photos' / 复数名词 'photos'

data.en: We are all on a tour of the Niagara Falls.
data.cn: 我们都在游览尼亚加拉瀑布。
data.hint: Phrase 'on a tour' / 短语 '在游览中'

data.en: We are wearing raincoats but still getting wet.
data.cn: 我们穿着雨衣，但还是淋湿了。
data.hint: Conjunction 'but' / 连词 'but' (但是)

data.en: The water is pouring fast over the falls.
data.cn: 水正快速从瀑布上倾泻而下。
data.hint: Adverb 'fast' / 副词 'fast' (快速地)

data.en: Some people are playing in the water.
data.hint: Present continuous action / 现在进行时的动作

data.en: My uncle is teaching me how to surf.
data.cn: 我叔叔正在教我如何冲浪。
data.hint: Question word + infinitive / 疑问词 + 不定式

data.en: It feels great to ride the waves.
data.hint: Verb 'feel' as a linking verb / 系动词 'feel' (感觉)

data.en: This is my first time seeing the sea.
data.cn: 这是我第一次看到大海。
data.hint: Phrase 'first time doing' / 短语 '第一次做某事'
